title: Undeepslated
description: Simple datapack/mod that turns deepslate underground into regular stone!
body:
# Undeepslated  |  By Wilozyx

Undeepslated is a world-generation-focused datapack & mod which aims to remove deepslate blocks and deepslate ores from the underground of worlds, instead, Y levels -64 to 0 are generated with regular stone, aswell as regular stone ores!

Undeepslated is very simplistic and only alters the overworld's noise settings & configured placed ore features, datapacks/mods that change/add/remove things like biomes, structures, features, etc should work!

Made with ❤️

### NOTE:
All my work is 100% public property, feel free to use this in your own modpacks/datapacks, or edit/modify/tweak it as much as you like!
